summary: Added a new skill for Trigger.dev expert guidance on building reliable background jobs with exceptional developer experience. Covers capabilities for trigger-dev-tasks, ai-background-jobs, integration-tasks, scheduled-triggers, webhook-handlers, long-running-tasks, task-queues, and batch-processing. Includes patterns for basic task setup, AI tasks with OpenAI integration, and scheduled tasks with cron. Documents anti-patterns like giant monolithic tasks and ignoring built-in integrations, along with sharp edges including task timeouts, non-serializable payloads, environment variable syncing, SDK version mismatches, task retries causing side effects, high concurrency issues, config file location, and wait.for loops causing memory issues.
